nodes.name: 米納哈薩半島
nodes.summary: 米納哈薩半島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括紫针尾雨燕、Scaly-breasted kingfisher，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: Gunung Ambang Nature Reserve
nodes.summary: Gunung Ambang Nature Reserve是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Stephan's emerald dove、Scaly-breasted kingfisher，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Scaly-breasted kingfisher
nodes.summary: Scaly-breasted kingfisher（Scaly-breasted kingfisher，学名 Actenoides princeps），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联2个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: regalis is found in the southeast, but is now regarded as its own species, the plain-backed kingfisher. In the Minahassa Peninsula of northern Sulawesi, the nominate subspecies is found in the Gunung Ambang Nature Reserve in primary forest at elevations between above sea level. Its habitat is the dense understorey of undisturbed primary forest

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: regalis is found in the southeast, but is now regarded as its own species, the plain-backed kingfisher. In the Minahassa Peninsula of northern Sulawesi, the nominate subspecies is found in the Gunung Ambang Nature Reserve in primary forest at elevations between above sea level. Its habitat is the dense understorey of undisturbed primary forest

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical, moist, montane forests

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The scaly-breasted kingfisher has a somewhat restricted range in Indonesia and its population size is believed to be decreasing due to habitat loss, but is considered to be least concern by the IUCN.
